description_long: This is a square wooden coffee table with a glass top and a lower wooden shelf. The frame and legs are made of a warm, medium-brown wood, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The tabletop is inset with a large, clear glass panel, allowing visibility through to the shelf below. The lower shelf is solid wood and spans the entire width and depth of the table, providing additional storage or display space. The legs are straight and slightly tapered, contributing to a modern yet timeless design. There are no visible handles, doors, or drawers, and the construction appears robust and well-finished.
description: A square wooden coffee table with a glass top and a full-width lower wooden shelf, featuring a sturdy, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden frame, glass top, and the full lower shelf beneath.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the glass top and the depth of the lower shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with clear visibility of the glass top and shelf.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the glass top and the lower shelf, with no visible differences from other sides.
